aiden_intro.speaker: Player
aiden_intro.text: I don't think he hears us…

aiden_intro_oh.speaker: Aiden
aiden_intro_oh.text: Oh, hi. Can I help you?

aiden_intro_showing.speaker: Inez
aiden_intro_showing.text: We're not shopping today, I'm just showing my friend around since they just arrived here.

aiden_intro_moved.speaker: Aiden
aiden_intro_moved.text: I didn't know someone new had moved into town. It's nice to meet you, my name is Aiden.

aiden_intro_help.speaker: Aiden
aiden_intro_help.text: If you want help getting to know anyone here, I'm happy to help. Amaranth Heights is a small town, and I grew up here, so I know pretty much everyone.

aiden_intro_back.speaker: Aiden
aiden_intro_back.text: Well, I should get back to work. See you around.

aiden_repeat.speaker: Aiden
aiden_repeat.text: Is there anything in particular you're looking for, or are you just browsing?

aiden_about_inez.speaker: Aiden
aiden_about_inez.text: Inez moved to town when I was just starting high school. She's friendly, but we haven't had the chance to speak much. She spends a lot of time near town's exit.

aiden_about_self.speaker: Aiden
aiden_about_self.text: There's not much to say. I go to university in the next town over and work here to cover the expenses. Hm… If you want to find me and I'm not working, I might be at the bar. I drink with my friend Oran pretty regularly.

aiden_day2_empty.speaker: Player
aiden_day2_empty.text: It looks like no one is here.

aiden_day3.speaker: Aiden
aiden_day3.text: Welcome to The Shop, can I help you with...

choices.text: I’m investigating some strange things I found at the dig site.

aiden_nothing.speaker: Aiden
aiden_nothing.text: Yeah, there’s not a lot going on here, either.

aiden_investigating.speaker: Aiden
aiden_investigating.text: Ah.. isn’t everything you find out there ‘strange’?

aiden_investigating2.speaker: Aiden
aiden_investigating2.text: All that archeology and history stuff flies over my head.

aiden_help.speaker: Aiden
aiden_help.text: So.. can I help you with anything?

aiden_oran.speaker: Aiden
aiden_oran.text: You want to know more about Oran?

aiden_oran2.speaker: Aiden
aiden_oran2.text: Hm.. I guess there isn’t much I could say when he was sitting right there...

aiden_oran3.speaker: Aiden
aiden_oran3.text: Oh! Oran actually arrived in town about [color=#16C1DE]the same time as Florence.[/color]

aiden_oran4.speaker: Aiden
aiden_oran4.text: They seemed closer when they first got here… I wonder what happened.

aiden_florence.speaker: Aiden
aiden_florence.text: Florence? You want to know more about them?

aiden_florence2.speaker: Aiden
aiden_florence2.text: Uh.. I honestly don’t know much about them, they’re kind of elusive.

aiden_camila.speaker: Aiden
aiden_camila.text: She’s smart; she knows practically everything there is to know about Amaranth Heights.

aiden_camila2.speaker: Aiden
aiden_camila2.text: If you have any questions about the town, she’s the person to ask.
